SEARCH
Package discount

Class ProductQuantity

java.lang.Object
discount.Discount
discount.ProductDiscount
discount.ProductQuantity
All Implemented Interfaces:
QuantityDiscount
public class ProductQuantity extends ProductDiscount implements QuantityDiscount
It implements the Product discount whose type is Quantity
Version:
1.0
Author:
Ana O.R.
See Also:
  • StoreProduct

  • Constructor Details

    • ProductQuantity

      public ProductQuantity(String id, LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, int numThreshold, double deduction, StoreProduct... products)
      A quantity discount's general constructor with products
      Parameters:
      id - the discount's id
      startDate - the date when the discount starts
      endDate - the date when the discount ends
      numThreshold - the amount of products in a cart from which the discount can take place
      deduction - the amount of money the discount deducts from the order's final price
      products - the discount's products

    • ProductQuantity

      public ProductQuantity(String id, LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, int numThreshold, double deduction, boolean overWholeStore)
      A quantity discount's general constructor over the whole store
      Parameters:
      id - the discount's id
      startDate - the date when the discount starts
      endDate - the date when the discount ends
      numThreshold - the amount of products in a cart from which the discount can take place
      deduction - the amount of money the discount deducts from the order's final price
      overWholeStore - whether the discount is applied over the whole store or not (must be true)

    • ProductQuantity

      public ProductQuantity(LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, int numThreshold, double deduction, StoreProduct... products) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Instantiates a new quantity discount with products
      Parameters:
      startDate - the date when the discount starts
      endDate - the date when the discount ends
      numThreshold - the amount of products in a cart from which the discount can take place
      deduction - the amount of money the discount deducts from the order's final price
      products - the discount's products
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException

    • ProductQuantity

      public ProductQuantity(LocalDateTime startDate, LocalDateTime endDate, int numThreshold, double deduction, boolean overWholeStore) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Instantiates a new quantity discount over the whole store
      Parameters:
      startDate - the date when the discount starts
      endDate - the date when the discount ends
      numThreshold - the amount of products in a cart from which the discount can take place
      deduction - the amount of money the discount deducts from the order's final price
      overWholeStore - whether the discount is applied over the whole store or not (must be true)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException
